body_html:
yes

--- DKIESQ@aol.com wrote:

I just spoke to Emad and found out that he sent you
that message. Placement
commission with respect to Rich Kahn's hire is
$45,000, which is 25% of
Rich's starting salary. I did not want to put
Rich's salary in the message
sheet. I assume that NYSG should pay the
commission.
